lead_profile_text: Already operating STL (former home live since March, ~£2,500/month gross at 60% occupancy). Kennedy Chadwick Estates — property development partnership with partner and stepdad. Second property (Rossendale Road) ready in ~2 weeks. Pipeline includes third house and land for two additional properties.
emotional_profile: Ambitious and entrepreneurial. Emotionally invested in renovation quality. Frustrated by Booking.com guest quality. Wants scalable management, not operational burden.
delay_trigger_phrases: Could we test long-let for a month first?
Test the long-term rental market first before committing to STL
green_light_trigger_phrases: We don't want to become manual cleaners, we're entrepreneurs
Two changeovers at the same time and we'd need to hire cleaners anyway

top_objections.text: Two simultaneous changeovers would make us manual cleaners instead of entrepreneurs
top_objections.zac_response: Stayful handles all cleaning and coordination — frees you to scale

top_objections.text: Booking.com guest quality — drug preparation incident, unrecovered damage
top_objections.zac_response: Guest screening with £200 deposit and ID checks; AirCover for damage protection

top_objections.text: Worst month STL projection (£952) narrowly below monthly costs (£1,100)
top_objections.zac_response: Honest framing applied — worst month is outlier; average and peak months clear costs comfortably

top_objections.text: Emotional attachment to renovation — granite countertops, £10k furnishings
top_objections.zac_response: £200 deposit, ID checks, AirCover — property protection layers highlighted

top_objections.text: Considering testing LTL for 1 month first (£1,300-1,400/month quoted)
top_objections.zac_response: LTL option acknowledged; STL annual average significantly higher once ramped

top_questions.text: How do you handle guest damage?
top_questions.answer: £200 deposit, ID checks, AirCover £100k damage protection — damage claims handled by Stayful

top_questions.text: What does the Slack channel look like?
top_questions.answer: Dedicated channel with your team members — calendar access, approval requests, monthly statements

top_questions.text: Can you manage multiple properties as we scale?
top_questions.answer: Yes — portfolio partnership is the model; scales without operational burden on owners

what_moved_them: Guest screening with deposits and ID checks — directly addressed Booking.com pain
Scalability pitch — freeing them to be entrepreneurs not manual cleaners
Slack channel and monthly reporting as professional management layer
what_fell_flat: Worst-month projection slightly below costs — not fully resolved
LTL alternative (£1,300-1,400) is a credible competing option for this specific property

conversion_gaps.gap: LTL vs STL margin is genuinely tight on worst month
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Show full 12-month projection — average and best months dwarf worst month; show Year 2 ramp

conversion_gaps.gap: Strategic hesitation — wants to test LTL first
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Acknowledge LTL optionality; emphasise 6-month STL trial with 3-month exit thereafter

zac_close_phrase: Action plan sent within 15-20 minutes of call
zac_income_intro: Property ready in ~2 weeks — first month figures will vary but annual average significantly above LTL alternative
zac_transition_phrases: The real opportunity here is what happens when you get to three or four properties
That Booking.com experience is exactly what our screening process is designed to prevent
zac_reassurance_phrases: £200 deposit, ID checks — we vet before anyone gets keys
Monthly statements, Slack channel — you'll always know what's happening
